# Supplier Risk Management: Building Resilient Supply Chains for Critical Biosafety Infrastructure

## 适用受众
CEO

## 写作角度说明
生物安全设备是生产连续性的关键组件，供应商的稳定性直接影响企业运营风险。本角度帮助 CEO 评估供应商的企业稳定性，制定供应链风险管理策略。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Supplier stability—financial health, engineering workforce retention, patent portfolio depth—directly translates to operational continuity risk that CFOs and operations leaders must quantify and mitigate.

## 参考素材
- Supplier stability indicators: years in business (JIEHAO: 20+ years), patent portfolio (20+ patents), reference installations (100+ P3 laboratories)
- Manufacturing capability assessment: in-house vs outsourcing, production capacity, quality control infrastructure
- Financial stability signals: ISO certifications, export market presence (Russia, Singapore, Turkey, Southeast Asia)
- Diversification strategy: single-source vs multi-source procurement trade-offs
- Long-term partnership value: spare parts availability, software update continuity, technology roadmap alignment

## 关键词
Supplier Risk, Supply Chain Resilience, Operational Continuity, Strategic Partnership, Financial Stability, Patent Portfolio
